name: set_environment_variable
description: Create a new environment variable for a Vercel project. Specify the key, value, type (plain, encrypted, secret), and which target environments it applies to (production, preview, development). The project will use the new variable on the next deployment.

parameters.name: idOrName
parameters.description: The project ID or name to set the environment variable for.

parameters.name: target
parameters.description: Array of target environments: 'production', 'preview', 'development'. At least one must be specified.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Variable type: 'plain' (visible), 'encrypted' (encrypted at rest), or 'secret' (write-only, never readable). Default is 'encrypted'.

parameters.name: gitBranch
parameters.description: Only apply this variable to deployments from a specific Git branch. Only works with 'preview' target.
